subject: [RFC PATCH 1/5] mm, swap: add virtual swap device infrastructure

2026-05-28.patch_summary: This patch introduces the virtual swap device infrastructure, including a massive virtual swap device created at boot and dynamic cluster information stored in an xarray. The size of the vswap device is set to be aligned down from UINT_MAX pages. A new CONFIG_VSWAP option is added, which depends on SWAP and 64BIT. The patch also introduces the general shape of a vswap allocator with sanity checks but does not hook it into any allocation path yet. This is considered pure scaffolding and will be completed in subsequent patches.
